response:
I don't have a file-writing tool available in this session (no Write/Edit/Bash tool is loaded, and none of the deferred tools — Cron*, DesignSync, EnterWorktree, Monitor, PushNotification, RemoteTrigger — can create a local file), so I can't save to `outputs/frontmatter.md` directly. Here's the frontmatter block; please save it yourself:

```yaml
---
name: infra-plan-review
description: Use when reviewing a Terraform plan before approving an infrastructure change - flags destructive or replacement changes to stateful resources (databases, volumes, buckets), IAM/security-group changes that widen access, and changes to resources outside the ticket's scope, then posts a risk-annotated review comment.
---
```
